TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Calasiv, title = Calasiv, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calasiv} }

S.FORM: alang Calasiv ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 538 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 514 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Calasiv hya' ga Kuljaljau. tay mkyahu' na Calasiv hya' ga Pucunug. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Calasiv ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 157 buwan, 538 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 514 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Calasiv hya' ga Kuljaljau. tay mkyahu' na Calasiv hya' ga Pucunug. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨalas~ɕi* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨalas~ɕi* ħjaʔ ɣa kuljaljau. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨalas~ɕi* ħjaʔ ɣa puʦ~ʨunuɣ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
